roa.docketEntryComment: PD REQUEST TO ADD TO CALENDAR FOR DISPO FILED
DEFENSE PC17B PETITION FOR REDUCTION, FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT

/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 15/TRANS 15:FORTHWITH FOR PRETRIAL/CAL:STATUS OF DEJ//DAWT/X:GUILTY PLEA IS WITHDRAWN,  DEFENDANT HAS SATISFIED ALL THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT,/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/BE/SATERM/SATERM/

/CAL: SENTENCE/INTC/15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA/DEFT ADV RTS: 3/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/CTORD:FOR THE NEXT 6 MONTHS FROM THIS DATE THE DEFENDANT SHALL INCUR NO NEW CHARGES, SHALL ABIDE BY THE  STAY OUT OF ORDER FILED ON 06-07-17 & SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE 60HOURS OF COMMUNITYSERVICE/BE/VD:07-12-17/SA2:MACY'S AT 170 O'FERRAL ST SFCA/CTORD:THE AFFOREMENTIONED IS A 'STAY OUT OF' ORDER/SAORD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X:DFEENSE MOTION TO REDUCE CHARGES PURSUANT TO 17BPCDENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW 60/LDPX:01-30-17/987,2/SA4:MACY'S AT 170 O'FARRELL STREET,SF/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:REQUEST FOR DISPO/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRETRIAL/INTC/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/FAWC/IRRC/GTWM/CONTD TO BE SET,DOP /CONTD:TO SET/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/STWPX/X:SUB, CAD RELEASED TO DEFENSE/COND:FUR PHC/DOP/
